name: goliath/hiw-installation
title: How It Works – Installation Process
description: Two-column section: HTML5 video on the left, numbered installation steps on the right.

step1Desc.default: We use a specially designed cutting jig that's bolted to the existing damaged upright. This allows us to get a factory cut to the upright. The damaged section is cut out using a handheld bandsaw with a cutting jig that allows us to make a perfect cut every time. The damaged upright is removed. We use a prop system to hold the empty racking in place.

step2Desc.default: Goliath™ is fitted into place and all nuts and bolts are loosely fitted, which connects the upright and repair kit together.

step3Desc.default: Bracing is bolted to Goliath™, and the prop is lowered, allowing all nuts and bolts to be tightened.

step4Desc.default: Goliath™ is fixed down using two no. M16 double helix floor bolts, designed to work with Goliath™ to offer extra strength.

step5Desc.default: Installation is complete. You can resume your warehouse operations, knowing that any previously damaged racking has been repaired.
